texto: Reading is at the threshold of the spiritual life
autor: it can introduce us to it. It does not constitute it ... There are certain cases of spiritual depression in which reading can become a sort of curative discipline ... reintroducing a lazy mind into the life of the Spirit.
explicacao: Citação de it can introduce us to it. It does not constitute it ... There are certain cases of spiritual depression in which reading can become a sort of curative discipline ... reintroducing a lazy mind into the life of the Spirit. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Reading is at the threshold of the spiritual life” articula reflexao, marcel-proust, reading em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
